name: kammaren-tax-engine
description: Deterministic Swedish 3:12 tax optimization engine for sole-owner AB companies. Verified against Skatteverket's official tax table.
author: Gustaf Baltsar Garnow <gustaf@kammaren.nu>

scripts.test:all: npm run test && npm run verify && npm run verify:skv
scripts.postbuild: node --input-type=commonjs -e 'const fs=require("fs");const d="./build";for(const f of fs.readdirSync(d).filter(f=>f.endsWith(".js"))){const p=d+"/"+f;const c=fs.readFileSync(p,"utf8");const n=c.replace(/from "(\.[^"]+)"/g,(m,x)=>x.endsWith(".js")?m:`from "${x}.js"`);if(n!==c)fs.writeFileSync(p,n)}'
